# constrainsToOriginalSize()

**Instance Method**

Returns whether the receiver constrains the cell’s image to its original size.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func constrainsToOriginalSize() -> Bool
```

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] if the image is not constrained; otherwise [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true].

## Setting the Appearance

- **setCellsStyleMask(_:)**: Defines the appearance style of the cells.
- **cellsStyleMask()**: Returns the appearance style mask for the cell.
- **setConstrainsToOriginalSize(_:)**: Sets whether the receiver constrains the cell’s image to its original size.
- **setIntercellSpacing(_:)**: Sets the spacing between cells in the view.
- **intercellSpacing()**: Returns the spacing between cells in the view.
